skill.name: avalonia-layout-zafiro
skill.description: Guidance for building cleaner Avalonia layouts with Zafiro.Avalonia containers, shared styles, icons, behaviors, and reusable components.
skill.summary: Design maintainable Avalonia UI layouts with Zafiro.Avalonia patterns.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: The static analyzer reported many external command and weak-crypto patterns, but review found they are false positives from Markdown backticks, XML examples, and UI text. The main confirmed concern is a skill instruction that points agents to an absolute local repository path, which can encourage reading files outside the packaged skill.

medium_findings.title: Absolute Local Repository Path Reference
medium_findings.description: SKILL.md directs agents to consult an absolute path under /mnt/fast for an exemplary implementation. This is not confirmed malicious, but it can cause agents with read access to inspect files outside the skill package and outside the marketplace review boundary.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: The absolute path is directly present in the skill instructions and the skill declares Read access. The risk depends on the runtime filesystem, so it is concerning but not evidence of malware.

low_findings.title: Static External Command Findings Are False Positives
low_findings.description: The external command detections are Markdown inline code, fenced XML examples, or Avalonia identifiers such as Grid, StackPanel, EdgePanel, Icon, StaticResource, and DynamicResource. No shell execution, Ruby backticks, script invocation, or command construction was found in the reviewed files.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Line-number review shows documentation and XAML snippets rather than executable commands. There is no semantic evidence of command execution or command injection.

low_findings.title: Static Network Finding Is A Namespace False Positive
low_findings.description: The hardcoded URL is an Avalonia XML namespace inside a ResourceDictionary example, not an outbound request or data exfiltration endpoint.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The URL appears as an XML namespace declaration in a fenced XAML example. No HTTP client, fetch call, or network behavior is present around it.

dangerous_patterns.title: Out-of-Package Filesystem Reference
dangerous_patterns.description: The skill references a local absolute path as a related project. Marketplace users may not have this path, and agents could read unrelated local files if it exists.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: The path is explicit and outside the skill directory. It is risky by context, though no exfiltration or destructive action is requested.

content.value_statement: Avalonia views can become hard to maintain when layout, styling, and interaction logic are repeated in XAML. This skill guides Claude, Codex, and Claude Code toward reusable Zafiro.Avalonia containers, shared styles, and simpler component structure.
actual_capabilities: Recommends when to use HeaderedContainer, EdgePanel, Card, StackPanel, Grid, and UniformGrid.
Guides theme organization with shared color, brush, style, icon, and resource files.
Shows how to replace repeated XAML properties with classes and shared styles.
Explains icon usage through IconExtension, IconOptions, StaticResource, and shared resources.
Advises when behaviors, ViewModel properties, or converters should handle UI logic.
Encourages reusable UserControls and flatter layouts for common screen patterns.
limitations: It provides guidance and examples, not a complete Avalonia application template.
It assumes the project can use Zafiro.Avalonia controls and related markup extensions.
It does not verify package versions, compile XAML, or run UI tests by itself.
One referenced local example path may not exist in user environments.

use_cases.title: Refactor A Settings Screen
use_cases.description: Convert repeated sections into semantic containers with shared classes and simpler internal content.

use_cases.title: Standardize Desktop UI Themes
use_cases.description: Organize colors, brushes, typography, container styles, and icon resources into reusable theme files.

use_cases.title: Review XAML Maintainability
use_cases.description: Identify unnecessary nesting, repeated visual properties, converter overuse, and missing reusable components.

prompt_templates.title: Review A Simple View
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner review of one Avalonia view.
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this Avalonia view for cleaner Zafiro.Avalonia layout. Suggest semantic containers, shared styles, and simpler bindings without changing behavior.

prompt_templates.title: Refactor Repeated Sections
prompt_templates.prompt: Find repeated layout and styling patterns in these Avalonia screens. Propose reusable components, classes, and theme resources using Zafiro.Avalonia conventions.

prompt_templates.title: Plan Theme Organization
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced design system work for a desktop app.
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a theme organization plan for this Avalonia project. Include colors, brushes, typography, container styles, icons, and merged resource dictionaries.

prompt_templates.title: Audit Interaction Logic
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced review of UI logic placement.
prompt_templates.prompt: Audit this Avalonia UI for converter overuse, code-behind logic, and complex XAML triggers. Recommend ViewModel properties or behaviors where appropriate.

output_examples.input: A view repeats the same header, border, padding, and background settings across several sections.
output_examples.output: The skill recommends a shared container class, a reusable HeaderedContainer style, and moving repeated values into theme resources.

output_examples.input: A row uses nested grids to show an icon, label, value, and action button.
output_examples.output: The skill suggests flattening the row with EdgePanel slots and applying icon styling through shared IconOptions.

output_examples.input: A converter controls focus and visual state for a text box.
output_examples.output: The skill recommends checking whether a ViewModel property or reusable behavior can express the interaction more clearly.

best_practices: Read only the guidance file that matches the current layout problem.
Move repeated colors, sizes, borders, and icon options into shared styles or resources.
Keep examples aligned with the project’s existing Avalonia and Zafiro.Avalonia conventions.
anti_patterns: Do not paste large repeated XAML blocks when a semantic container or component would be clearer.
Do not hardcode visual values across views when theme resources can define them once.
Do not use converters for logic that belongs in a ViewModel property or behavior.

faq.question: What does this skill help with?
faq.answer: It helps improve Avalonia layout structure using Zafiro.Avalonia containers, shared styles, icons, behaviors, and reusable components.

faq.question: Does it generate a full application?
faq.answer: No. It gives focused layout and maintainability guidance for existing or planned Avalonia views.

faq.question: Can it be used without Zafiro.Avalonia?
faq.answer: Some guidance applies generally, but many recommendations depend on Zafiro.Avalonia controls and markup extensions.

faq.question: Does it run commands or install packages?
faq.answer: No evidence found that the skill runs commands or installs packages. It is documentation guidance.

faq.question: Why is the audit risk medium?
faq.answer: The static command and network findings were false positives, but the skill references an absolute local repository path outside the package.

faq.question: Which tools can use it?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
